title: ABOUT THE AUTHOR
text: ABOUT THE AUTHOR Photograph © Kim Bills Jeff Wheeler is a writer from 7 p.m. to 10 p.m. on Wednesday nights. The rest of the time, he works for Intel Corporation, is a husband and the father of five kids, and a leader in his local church. He lives in Rocklin, California. When he isn’t listening to books during his commute, he is dreaming up new stories to write. His website is: www.jeff-wheeler.com
